content: Just as ICM curiosity mechanisms give 2025 reinforcement learning autonomous agents intrinsic reward to seek out unexplored target environments, biological pathogenic agents (from the biology definition of "agent") can be modeled as inherently "curious" autonomous entities driven by an intrinsic drive to seek out novel, uncolonized host niches to spread. This framing lets researchers reuse 2025 ICM-based swarm UAV path-planning frameworks to predict how viral or bacterial biological agents spread through heterogeneous host populations.
